question: Opening Hook: How do you introduce the setting of Gintama?
text: If you haven't watched Gintama, you are missing a masterpiece! Imagine historical Japan (Edo Period), but conquered by Aliens. It's sci-fi meets samurai. It is sharp, absurd, hilarious, but also heartbreakingly warm. This is our first-ever collaboration!

question: Character Pitch: Describe Gintoki's contrasting personality.
text: Meet Sakata Gintoki. He looks lazy, has a silver perm, and a serious sugar addiction. He carries a wooden sword inscribed 'Lake Toya'. But don't let the dead fish eyes fool you—deep down, he is the 'White Yaksha', the dependable soul of the samurai spirit.

question: Interaction: Use the 'Glasses' running joke to engage the chat.
text: Next is Shinpachi. But be honest, are we pulling for the boy or the glasses? In the anime, 95% of his character is the glasses, and the human body is just a stand! Who wants the glasses? Type 'Glasses' in the chat!

question: Visual Contrast: Sell the 'Gap Moe' of Kagura (Cute vs. Strong).
text: Look at the cute space buns! But watch out—she is from the Yato Clan. She is literally the muscle of the group. She's holding her bulletproof umbrella. She is savage, has a bottomless stomach for food, and is absolutely adorable.

question: Detail Highlight: Point out the funny accessory for the Vice Commander.
text: Here is the 'Demon Vice Commander' Hijikata. He looks super cool and tough reading his mission brief, right? But look closely at his hand... yes, that is a bottle of Mayonnaise. He puts mayo on everything. It's the perfect detail for fans.

question: Shock Value: Explain why the Gorilla Commander is 'Gold'.
text: Why is he gold? It's not gold, it's HONEY! This figure recreates the legendary scene where he strips naked and covers himself in honey to catch a rare bug. It looks like an antique sculpture, but it's actually the most hilarious moment in the show.

question: Character Pitch: Describe the 'Sadistic Prince'.
text: The Sadistic Prince, Okita. He wears this funny eye mask and looks innocent, but he carries a Bazooka! He is constantly trying to 'accidentally' eliminate his boss, Hijikata. If you love chaotic energy, you need him.

question: Lore & Catchphrase: Teach the audience what to say for Katsura.
text: If you pull this long-haired beauty, you have to know the line. It's not Zura, it's Katsura! He comes with Elizabeth, the mysterious duck pet. Rumor has it... there's a hairy middle-aged man inside the duck costume. Creepy but cute!

question: Scarcity Sell: Pitch the Secret Chaser (The Dog).
text: The Secret is the giant mascot, Sadaharu! The sculpt captures the classic scene of him biting Gintoki's head. It is a 1 in 144 chance. It captures the warmth and chaos of the Yorozuya family perfectly. Good luck hunting this one!

question: Close: Push for the Whole Set purchase.
text: This is Pop Mart's FIRST blind box series with Gintama. There are 12 iconic characters including the Shinsengumi and Otae. If you want the full cast without duplicates, grab the Whole Box now. Don't miss out on this masterpiece.
